2606.16799.title: Decoupling Semantics from Distortions: Multi-Scale Two-Stream Vision-Language Alignment for AI-Generated Image Quality Assessment
2606.16799.paper_summary: Existing vision-language model (VLM)-based AI-generated image quality assessment (AIGIQA) methods suffer from a fundamental semantic-distortion dimensional conflict: monolithic representations optimized for semantic discrimination inherently entangle compositional understanding with low-level perceptual sensitivity, rendering them blind to fine-grained quality degradations. We introduce MST-CLIPIQA, a multi-scale two-stream framework that achieves hierarchical vision-language alignment through explicit representational decoupling. Our architecture leverages dual CLIP encoders with complementary patch granularities: coarse-grained streams capture global semantic coherence while fine-grained streams preserve textural signatures and artifact patterns. An information bottleneck-inspired gated fusion mechanism performs adaptive cross-scale distillation, with optional cross-attention enabling prompt-anchored correspondence evaluation when generation prompts are available. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks establish new state-of-the-art results, achieving average improvements of 1.11 percent SRCC on quality and 2.35 percent SRCC on text-image correspondence prediction, while maintaining efficiency with only 0.8M trainable parameters. Our project is available at https://github.com/YMlinfeng/MST-CLIPIQA.
2606.16799.paper_summary_zh: 現有的基於視覺-語言模型 (VLM) 的 AI 生成圖像質量評估 (AIGIQA) 方法存在一個根本的語義扭曲維度衝突：為語義區分優化的單一表示本質上將組合理解與低層次感知敏感性糾纏在一起，使其對細微的質量退化視而不見。<lb/>我們引入了 MST-CLIPIQA，一個多尺度雙流框架，通過明確的表示解耦實現層次化的視覺-語言對齊。<lb/>我們的架構利用了具有互補補丁粒度的雙 CLIP 編碼器：粗粒度流捕捉全局語義一致性，而細粒度流則保留紋理特徵和工件模式。<lb/>受信息瓶頸啟發的門控融合機制執行自適應跨尺度蒸餾，當生成提示可用時，選擇性跨注意力使得基於提示的對應評估成為可能。<lb/>在五個基準上的大量實驗建立了新的最先進結果，在質量上實現了平均 1.11% 的 SRCC 改進，在文本-圖像對應預測上實現了 2.35% 的 SRCC 改進，同時僅用 0.8M 的可訓練參數保持效率。<lb/>我們的項目可在 https://github.com/YMlinfeng/MST-CLIPIQA 獲得。
2606.16799.author: Zijie Meng et.al.
